ceb.about 1407–before 3 Jan 1436: mga 1407–sa wala pa ang 3 sa Enero 1436
ceb.before 3 Jan 1436: sa wala pa ang 3 sa Enero 1436

英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard II Sherburne於大約1407年出生在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特時，他的父親Richard Sherburne27歲，母親Agnes Harington17歲。他於1420年與Alice de Hamerton在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年1月3日之前在他的家鄉。

英国英格兰藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh-hans.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard II Sherburne于大约1407年出生在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特时，他的父亲Richard Sherburne27岁，母亲Agnes Harington17岁。他于1420年与Alice de Hamerton在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年1月3日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard II Sherburne was born about 1407, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Sherburne, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Harington, was 17. He married Alice de Hamerton in 1420, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 3 January 1436, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard II Sherburne est né environ 1407, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Sherburne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harington, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Hamerton en 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 3 janvier 1436, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard II Sherburne um 1407 in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Sherburne 27 und seine Mutter Agnes Harington 17. Er hat 1420 in Yorkshire, England Alice de Hamerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 3. Januar 1436 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard II Sherburne è nato il circa 1407 nel Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Sherburne, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Harington, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Hamerton nel 1420, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 3 gennaio 1436, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルスト
ja.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルスト
ja.lifeSummary: Richard II Sherburneが約1407年にイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストで生まれた時，父Richard Sherburneは27歳，母Agnes Haringtonは17歳であった。1420年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice de Hamertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1436年1月3日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard II Sherburne(이)가 대략 1407년 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Sherburne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Harington(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 요르크실르에서 Alice de Hamerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 1월 3일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1407–before 3 Jan 1436: ойролцоогоор 1407 он–1436 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 3–наас өмнө
Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard II Sherburne nasceu aproximadamente 1407, em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Sherburne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Harington, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Hamerton em 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 3 de janeiro de 1436, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard II Sherburne родился около 1407 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Sherburne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harington, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Hamerton в 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 3 январь 1436 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1407–before 3 Jan 1436: e tusa o le 1407–a'e le'I oo le 3 Ianuari 1436

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard II Sherburne nació aproximadamente 1407, en Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Sherburne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Harington, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Alice de Hamerton en 1420, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 3 de enero de 1436, en su pueblo.
